issues.detail: Instructions lack error handling and edge case coverage.

scenarios.name: Thanos sidecar with S3 long-term storage
scenarios.rationale: Treatment includes the required 2h min/max block duration tuning on Prometheus, S3 bucket.yml, and both gRPC 10901 + HTTP 10902 endpoints; baseline typically omits the 2h block tuning that the skill calls out as required for sidecar compatibility.

scenarios.name: Thanos compactor downsampling and retention
scenarios.rationale: Treatment specifies per-resolution retention (raw=30d, 5m=90d, 1h=365d), the single-compactor-per-bucket rule, and --wait/--wait-interval; baseline tends to omit per-resolution retention and the singleton constraint.
